svg.text: 4 engines run in parallel for each country — all tools already built

g.text: Normalizer → dedup → score → per-country Excel + pipeline
Phase 1 countries — aviation data + all 3 existing tools
Each country gets 4 sources merged. Immediate BD-ready output.

svg.text: Phase 1 output: ~472K+ records across 8 countries. Scored, classified, Top 30 per country.
Only aviation authority source needs new work — the other 3 engines are already built and running.
FR (SIRENE ✅) also complete — total Phase 1 = 9 countries delivered.

g.text: CA, AU, IN, MX, DE, US-SEC
No free registry or aviation data
Download CSV / scrape HTML / parse PDF
Per-country scored list, Tier A → Kanban cards

svg.text: Each step can be a Claude skill or dock-radar API route. Steps 3-5 already proven on FR + NL.
Only Steps 1-2 need new work per country — and can be templated after first 3 countries.
